creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 234166
devel/go-perf: update to 0.0.0.20220411212318

- mark localperf and localperfdata as deprecated

This is the current version with no changes for about a month.  Not much changed since the last one.  Please note that this package is under development and hence has no stable releases or change logs.

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.
